# Test basic scenario functionality
mcp-mock-client -n -scenario ./testdata/scenarios/basic_scenario.json
stdout 'would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"clientInfo":{"name":"test-client","version":"0.1.0"}},"id":1}
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"listTools","params":{},"id":2}
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"getMetadata","params":{},"id":3}'

# Test verbose output
mcp-mock-client -n -scenario -v ./testdata/scenarios/basic_scenario.json
stdout 'Running scenario: Basic MCP Server Test
Description: Tests basic interaction with an MCP server
Steps: 3'
stdout 'Step 1: Initialize
  Description: Initialize the connection
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"clientInfo":{"name":"test-client","version":"0.1.0"}},"id":1}'
stdout 'Scenario completed successfully'

# Test advanced scenario
mcp-mock-client -n -scenario ./testdata/scenarios/advanced_scenario.json
stdout 'would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"clientInfo":{"name":"test-client","version":"0.1.0"}},"id":1}
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"executeTool","params":{"toolName":"calculator","input":{"operation":"add","a":5,"b":7}},"id":2}
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"listResources","params":{},"id":3}
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"invalidMethod","params":{},"id":4}'

# Create a mock recording for testing validation
-- mock_recording.mcp --
mcp-in {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"clientInfo":{"name":"test-client","version":"0.1.0"}},"id":1}
mcp-out {"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"serverInfo":{"name":"mock-server","version":"1.0.0"},"capabilities":{}},"id":1}
mcp-in {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"listTools","params":{},"id":2}
mcp-out {"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"tools":[]},"id":2}
mcp-in {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"getMetadata","params":{},"id":3}
mcp-out {"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"name":"mock-server","description":"A mock server for testing"},"id":3}

# Test auto-detection (this should run as a recording)
mcp-mock-client -n ./mock_recording.mcp
stdout 'would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"clientInfo":{"name":"test-client","version":"0.1.0"}},"id":1}
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"listTools","params":{},"id":2}
would send: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"getMetadata","params":{},"id":3}'
